author: codex-frontmatter-vocabulary

patch.value: Adopt ItemMetadata SDK reader after pm-cli terminology migration

Replace pm-changelog imports and documentation of the removed listAllFrontMatter SDK export with listAllItemMetadata so the published extension activates against pm-cli's canonical TOON metadata API and pm-cli release gates remain ecosystem-safe.

message: Created after duplicate-safe all-status search. Existing SDK integration items are closed historical work or track unrelated missing-dependency behavior; this issue is the new pm-cli API rename compatibility fix discovered by pm-cli PR #531 Gates (static).

value.author: codex-frontmatter-vocabulary
value.text: Evidence: pm-cli PR #531 Gates (static) failed because published pm-changelog imported removed listAllFrontMatter. Updated source and built extension artifacts to listAllItemMetadata and item metadata wording; installed the local pm-cli PR package without saving dependency changes; npm build passed and all 108 tests passed, including package install/activation coverage.

patch.value: Replaced obsolete SDK reader with listAllItemMetadata and verified the package against the pm-cli PR build with 108 passing tests.

author: codex-frontmatter-vocabulary

patch.value: Fixed by migrating the extension runtime to listAllItemMetadata.
Published pm-changelog activates against the renamed pm-cli SDK and its commands remain available.
Source and dist artifacts use listAllItemMetadata; local pm-cli package activation and all 108 package tests pass.

message: Completed issue-resolution evidence after close validation warning.
